Ibn Haldun Academy's 'Aesthetics'-Themed Spring Seminars Have Concluded

15.06.2023

The sixth and last week sessions of the Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars, which was themed "Aesthetics", were held on Saturday, June 10, in our campus and online via Zoom.

The program started with the third session of Assoc. Dr. Enis Doko's seminar titled "Aesthetics in Physics, Mathematics and Theology” then continued with the third session of Prof. Dr. Halil Berktay’s seminar titled " Three Great Changes in Western Aesthetics: Renaissance, 19th Century, 20th Century". After the lunch break, Prof. Dr. Mahmud Erol Kılıç held the second session of his seminar titled “Islamic Mysticism and Aesthetics"

Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars concluded after the last seminars of Assoc. Dr. Enis Doko, Prof. Dr. Halil Berktay and Prof. Dr. Mahmud Erol Kılıç and Calligrapher Hüseyin Kutlu’s closing lecture and Ibn Haldun Academy Award Ceremony on Saturday, June 10.

For more information:

https://ibnhaldunakademi.com
